description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a sleek, minimalist design with clean lines and large windows. The front facade includes a double garage, a paved walkway, and a manicured lawn bordered by a low wall. The backyard is landscaped with a swimming pool, several tall coniferous trees, and a central mature tree providing shade. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of dark and light tones, with extensive glazing on the main living areas. The property is enclosed by a perimeter wall, offering privacy and a sense of enclosure. The overall layout is spacious, with outdoor living areas and green spaces integrated into the design.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a double garage, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool, all enclosed by a perimeter wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, paved walkway, manicured lawn, and main entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long flat roof, grouped windows, and the backyard pool area with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the swimming pool, tall trees, and the open backyard space.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the garage, backyard, pool, and the overall layout of the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
